name: Decayed Evil 腐朽的邪恶
short_description: Decayed Evil is a semi realistic first person horror adventure puzzle game. Kill, his grandson seeks to unravel the mystery, only to discover that behind this dark and gloomy ancient mansion lies an unknown and terrifying truth.
detailed_description: This is a first person horror decryption game where players take on the role of the grandson of the world's last wizard, attempting to uncover the truth behind their grandfather's murder. Players need to face puzzles that arise, collect fragmented information to advance the plot, and uncover the truth behind hidden and bizarre events.
about_the_game: This is a first person horror decryption game where players take on the role of the grandson of the world's last wizard, attempting to uncover the truth behind their grandfather's murder. Players need to face puzzles that arise, collect fragmented information to advance the plot, and uncover the truth behind hidden and bizarre events.
supported_languages:
English*, Simplified Chinese, Japanese
*languages with full audio support
